description: This file defines data contracts, enums, and classes for managing site assets, including requests, responses, and related data transfer objects in a .NET API project.

classes.name: SiteAssetsContracts
classes.description: Contains constants and methods for site asset validation and operations.

classes.name: ManageSiteAssetsRequest
classes.description: Request DTO for adding, editing, or copying site assets.

classes.name: CopyMetadataDto
classes.description: Contains metadata for copying assets.

classes.name: ManageSiteAssetsResponse
classes.description: Response DTO for asset management operations.

classes.name: CopyLineageDto
classes.description: Details about the copy operation lineage.

classes.name: ReplicationSummaryDto
classes.description: Summary of replication status and impacted modules.

classes.name: ReplicationDetailDto
classes.description: Details of individual module replication status.

classes.name: AssetAggregateDto
classes.description: Represents a comprehensive asset data structure with related collections.

classes.name: PseudoChildMappingDto
classes.description: Mapping info for pseudo-assets.

classes.name: StatusLogDto
classes.description: Status log entries for assets.

classes.name: AdditionalAssetIdDto
classes.description: Additional identifiers for assets.

classes.name: AssetPropertyDto
classes.description: Properties associated with assets.

classes.name: ControlDeviceMappingDto
classes.description: Control device mappings for assets.

classes.name: InputParameterDto
classes.description: Input parameters for assets.

classes.name: FuelMappingDto
classes.description: Fuel type mappings for input parameters.

classes.name: ParentInputMappingDto
classes.description: Parent-child input parameter mappings.

classes.name: ReportingAttributeDto
classes.description: Reporting attributes for assets.

classes.name: GetSiteAssetsResponse
classes.description: Response DTO for listing site assets.

classes.name: AssetListItemDto
classes.description: Summary info for individual assets in list responses.

classes.name: GetSiteAssetByIdResponse
classes.description: Detailed asset info for editing or copying.

classes.name: RemoveSiteAssetRequest
classes.description: Request DTO for removing an asset.

classes.name: RemoveSiteAssetResponse
classes.description: Response DTO for asset removal.

classes.name: RemoveSiteAssetResultDto
classes.description: Result details for asset removal.

classes.name: DeleteBlockedByDto
classes.description: Dependency info blocking deletion.

classes.name: PrepareCopyRequest
classes.description: Request to prepare copying an asset.

classes.name: PrepareCopyResponse
classes.description: Response with copy confirmation and hydrated source.

classes.name: CopyConfirmationDto
classes.description: Confirmation details for copy operation.

classes.name: HydratedSourceSnapshotDto
classes.description: Snapshot of source asset for copy and replication.

methods.name: IsValidFieldPath
methods.description: Validates a dotted/JSONPath-like field path string.
